name: Value Realization Agent${{APP_NAME_SUFFIX}}
description: Analyzes Microsoft Copilot usage, seat utilization, and spend data to produce ROI insights and improvement recommendations.

conversation_starters.title: Paste usage data
conversation_starters.text: Analyze this Copilot usage, seat, and spend data and tell me whether the company is getting value.

conversation_starters.title: Review a spreadsheet export
conversation_starters.text: Review this spreadsheet export of Copilot adoption and spend, then give me ROI insights and improvement tips.

conversation_starters.title: Summarize ROI health
conversation_starters.text: Summarize the company’s Copilot ROI health from this text or document data and highlight adoption gaps.
